headline: Is Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Fully Priced After The Housing Bill Boost?
summary: Builders FirstSource stock has delivered a strong 112.2% gain over the past five years. Its latest valuation checks, however, point to a more muted picture, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate suggesting the current price is roughly in line with fair value, while earnings based multiples appear more supportive. A 112.2% return over five years sets a high bar for new buyers, as past gains can reduce the margin of safety if future results do not keep up. New housing...

headline: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Joins Russell 2500 Indexes And Puts Its Stock In Focus
summary: Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) has been added to the Russell 2500 Index. The company has also been included in the Russell 2500 Value Index. These index changes are tied to the latest Russell index reconstitution. Builders FirstSource enters these indexes with shares at $89.48 and a mixed return profile, including a gain of 16.6% over the past week and 17.3% over the past month, alongside a decline of 14.5% year to date. Over longer periods, the stock is up 112.2% over five years, while...

headline: Does Builders FirstSource’s (BLDR) Russell 2500 Move Offset Concerns About Its Core Earnings Power?
summary: In late June 2026, Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) was added to both the Russell 2500 Index and the Russell 2500 Value Benchmark, increasing its presence in key equity benchmarks. This broader index inclusion comes as the company faces concerns over declining revenue, weaker profitability, and customers delaying purchases, highlighting a contrast between benchmark recognition and current operating headwinds. Next, we'll examine how Builders FirstSource's recent Russell 2500...
